## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests (`python -m unittest tests.test_converter -v`)
- [ ] Manual conversion with a real Google Doc or .docx file
- [ ] All tests pass

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (type hints, docstrings)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README.md) accordingly
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have verified the output with a real document
